title: orchidaceae
intro: The orchidaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the orchid family. It is the largest and most diverse family of flowering plants, comprising over 30,000 known species. Orchidaceae includes a wide range of orchids, from terrestrial and epiphytic species to mycotrophic and saprophytic ones. This family is found in almost every part of the world, with the greatest diversity occurring in tropical and subtropical regions.
